reason: The image attempts to depict a scene reminiscent of the Fashoda Incident with officers in period attire. The clothing generally fits the era, and the sepia tone adds to the effect. However, the suits appear too modern in their cut and fabric (especially the textured suit). The tripod also looks anachronistic; its design feels more 20th century than late 19th. The man in the suit also seems out of place. While there were black individuals in the late 19th century, his presence at this event would be rare.
